title: Device Home Screen - Limited Support After Launch Date When LM Version Is Empty
scenario: When a newly released but unsupported device is connected after its launch date with empty LM version info, the home screen shows limited support with a green ring connection icon and an "i" icon that displays a "Device support coming soon" pop-up.
steps: Launch app and pair with headset; headset should be ON and properly connected.
expected: 1) Connection status icon is a green ring, and a black "i" icon appears on the top right corner. 2) A pop-up displays the message "Device support coming soon. In-app functionality may be limited." 3) The pop-up closes.
